system.description: While not as iconic or widespread amongst Space Marines as the Astartes bolter, the Astartes assault shotgun is a powerful and versatile weapon used by their Scouts. These bulky, clip-fed shotguns can fire in single shots and in both semi- and fully automatic modes, and can use an array of specialty ammunition ranging from armour-piercing penetrator rounds to the powerful manstopper rounds. Assault shotguns are best used in urban and close-quarters combat, as well as in boarding actions aboard voidships.
